ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., bowler, batsman, all-rounder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dominant_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the player (e.g., aggressive, defensive) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the player record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the player record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament, international) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A won, Team B won, draw) */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the match record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the match record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type FOREIGN KEY ("match_type") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match this inning belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who bowled this inning */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Inning number (1 or 2) */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Number of overs bowled in this inning */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded in this inning */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken in this inning */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled in this inning */,
  "no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no-balls bowled in this inning */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled in this inning */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Total number of extra runs conceded in this inning */,
  "dot_balls" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled in this inning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inning record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inning record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the inning record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inning record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this statistic belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by this player */,
  "innings_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of innings bowled by this player */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Total overs bowled by this player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by this player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by this player */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance by this player */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs conceded by this player per wicket */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of this player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of this player */,
  "best_bowling_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's best bowling performance */,
  "five_wicket_hauls" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls by the player */,
  "ten_wicket_hauls" INTEGER /* Number of ten-wicket hauls by the player */,
  "highest_run_conceded" INTEGER /* Highest number of runs conceded in a single match */,
  "lowest_run_conceded" INTEGER /* Lowest number of runs conceded in a single match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player statistic record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the player statistic record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the player statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match type record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the match type record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the match type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League this team belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country this team represents */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the venue (e.g., stadium, ground) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the venue record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the venue record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user role record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
